programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A woman is driven to murder when her newborns cursed cradle seeks revenge

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resorts to violence because they cant comprehend Will Sonia finally reveal whats happening or will carrying her brothers burden get the best of her

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who dont know their land holds lots of gold Gene puts a stop to it

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Lt Gerard agrees to work with Kimble for 24 hours to prove his innocence because someone who may have been there when his wife was killed posted bail for the one-armed man

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike helps to bust up a murderous alien-smuggling ring

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike gets involved in recovering stolen six valuable computer memory tapes which are being held for ransom

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Savages elite squadron is picked for a dangerous top secret bomb run but his men start to crack waiting for fog to lift over the English Channel while they are confined to base One of his best pilots Lt Lockridge is recovering from hepatitis waiting to complete his 25th mission which will get him sent back to the US Gen Savage the medical officer and the nurse who loves Lockridge debate is Lockridge malingering pretending to be A-OK or is he too ill to fly on the mission in which 13 are expected not to come back from

programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A man murders his beautiful younger wife when she threatens to leave him He then packs her body in a big suitcase and boards a train where he is stalked by an inquisitive detective

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Mchale 236
programme.desc: Mchale 236

programme.title: Mchale 309
programme.desc: Mchale 309

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After one full year of marriage Luke and Kate finally get to go on their honeymoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke McCoy is tricked into buying a swimming pool

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Even after he is ordered to go on vacation Max follows the Choker to Casablanca

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is led to believe that Max is carrying a secret code

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When BJ rescues a young lady from an assailant it hits Captain Cain where he lives

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: After Mitch saves a young girl from drowning he discovers her to be possessed by a demon who then possesses him for the demon needs a sacrifice to solidify its base of power on Earth Aware that time is running out for him Mitch must venture into the netherworld to find help from the only one who can battle the demon the recently deceased Stephanie Holden

programme.title: OPeration Repo
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party And with Sonias hands tied she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane The team takes to the skies but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars But after two members of the team bail when its time to save the company will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A transmission from Dr Logan in Texas City leads the Alphans to believe that they can finally land back on Earth through a revolutionary teleportation process The downside is that it is now 2120 on Earth and the surface has become an unbreathable wasteland through centuries of pollution The Alphans though are intent on abandoning the wandering moon However due to a hitch the Alphan test subjects find themselves in a primitive and hostile environment It is Scotland in the fourteenth century where the Scots are at war with the English invaders who kidnap the Alphan trio

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Hercules 215
programme.desc: Hercules 215

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While a dying colonel implants his brain in a deceased criminal the Taelons show a new electromagnetic pulse weapon Jonathan Doors wishes to acquire it

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens organise a series of armoured car heists in order to finance the purchase of rubies for their new laser weapons Meanwhile Ironhorse is kidnapped by the vengeful husband of a woman who had accidentally been shot dead by Ironhorse himself during a raid on a research installation that had been invaded by aliens

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Police drag in Kimble when a co-worker robs the liquor store the fugitives clerking in Some police suspect Kimbles involved but their chief knows hes not - because his alienated son is the stick-up man To repair their relationship the desperate father needs to get his son off Will he feed Kimble to his wolves to do so

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While travelling cross country Victoria and Heath have an accident resulting in Heath becoming pinned under their heavily loaded wagon Victoria seeks help and turns to a mysterious man who is being pursued by aggressive bounty hunters

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne travels to a border town to join Joe Baker who has a business proposition to capture wild mustangs south of the border Joe is sick but the backer and his wife are still game Cheyenne has to worry about Indians and the wife

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Josh Bangert v. Joe Laurence

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Henrique Santana v. Paul Kelly

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Mark Handley

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Stephan Puetz v. Rashid Yusupov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Anis Dada v. Scott Turner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Miles Anstead is set to battle in the cage at HK51 against Adrian Miles. See what life is like for him as he gets ready for the fight on October 14...time to choose your side!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The beautiful MAD agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution Safety Tip Dont eat food that looks old or bad; prevent food poisoning

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians set out to uncover the Renegade spy in their midst

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians move to stop Cy-Kills latest scheme stealing cargo-laden freighters to secure the materials he needs to build an undersea base

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside
